case_title: CHOW, STANLEY vs. AMELIO, PETER et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT AMELIO, PETER ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, STANLEY SERVED JAN-27-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMELIO, LISA

ROOM 503A JUDGE PRO-TEM MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 2:45 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF. PRESENT W/ COUNSEL JEFFREY CHEN, DEFT PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION WILL PERMIT PLTF. TO GET JUDGMENT IF DEFT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: JUDGMENT FOR REST. OF THE PREM. LOCATED AT 1726 TARAVAL ST, APT. 2, SF, CA AS WELL AS ANY AMOUNTS DUE. DEFTS TO PAY $2,300 IF DEFTS MOVE OUT BY 3/20/98, THE AMT OF $3,000 IF DEFTS MOVE OUT BY 3/30/98. TO KEEP ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FROM NOT BEING FILED, DEFT TO PAY $200 PER MONTH BY THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. IF DEFT COMPLIES, PLTF. TO DISMISS COMPLAINT. IF NOT, ON 24 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFT, PETITION COURT FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BASED ON DECLARATION OF DEFTS' NON-COMPLIANCE. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $500 TO BE TAKAN CARED ACCORDING TO LAW. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/ATTYS FEES. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP.
